notes.title: Summary of Operations and Significant Accounting Policies

sub_policies.A_business_operations: Franchises right to operate full-service nail salons; majority of locations sublet in Walmart stores
sub_policies.B_consolidation: FASB ASC 810; all significant intercompany eliminated
sub_policies.D_cash_equivalents: Cash and highly liquid investments with maturity ≤3 months
sub_policies.E_accounts_notes_receivable: Stated at expected collectible amount; allowance based on historical credit rates. Allowance for doubtful accounts: $361,213 (2024), $385,000 (2023). Past due receivables: $807,681 (2024), $883,800 (2023). Notes receivable allowance: $0 (2024), $28,390 (2023)
sub_policies.F_property_equipment: Cost basis, straight-line depreciation. Building/improvements 15-30 years; Equipment/furniture 3-7 years; Vehicles 3-7 years
sub_policies.G_intangible_assets: FASB ASC 350; franchise agreements and acquired intangibles at cost, straight-line amortization 60-180 months
sub_policies.H_contract_liabilities: Payments received before performance obligation satisfaction. Prospect deposits (initial, site, confirmation) liquidated on revenue recognition or refunded. Security deposits refunded or applied at termination. No contract assets as of 2024 or 2023
sub_policies.I_revenue_recognition: ASU 2014-09 (Topic 606). Franchise license = separate performance obligation (right to use). Monthly franchise fees: straight-line over contract life. Goods/charges: point in time when control transfers. License renewals: recognized no earlier than renewal period beginning. Sublease income: Topic 842, recognized over lease term. Incremental costs of obtaining contract: expensed as incurred (practical expedient)
sub_policies.J_income_taxes: LLC treated as partnership/S-corp for US tax — income passes through to members. Foreign subsidiaries (Canada, UK, Mexico) subject to local taxes. Income tax expense: $12,162 (2024), $18,425 (2023). No uncertain tax positions.
sub_policies.K_foreign_currency: Functional currency = local currency. Translation: assets/liabilities at period-end rate, equity at historical, income at average. Translation adjustments: ($7,450) and $13,274. Transaction losses: $58,808 and $10,292 in non-operating expenses
sub_policies.L_reclassifications: Certain 2023 reclassifications for comparability; no material change to equity or net income
sub_policies.N_compensated_absences: Personal days based on years of service; not cumulative; unused days paid at termination. Balance: $0 at both year-ends

notes.title: Operating ROU Assets and Subleased Assets

uk_loan.note: UK Business Interruption Program, paid off in 2024

detail.nature: Refundable, equal to 2 months rent at sublease inception

detail.lawsuits: Several from normal course — all categorized as remote or insured. No probable losses identified.

detail.cash_concentration: FDIC insured to $250K; CDIC to C$100K. Uninsured: $5.17M US + C$1.23M Canada

notes.title: Subsequent Events
notes.detail: Evaluated through March 28, 2025 (financial statement available date). No subsequent events disclosed.
